detail.name: NAB Tailored Home Loan
detail.description: Home loans for every need with tools, calculators and guides to help you choose.

features.additionalInfo: Save on interest with a 100% interest offset arrangement for variable rate home loans. 10 Offset accounts.
Stay on top of your home loan through the NAB App. You can track your home loan progress, estimate your property equity and more.
If you’re at least one full repayment ahead, you can redraw $500 or more with no fees. It’s simple to redraw using NAB Internet Banking. And the redraw is not available for fixed rate loans
Can be used as a construction loan. The loan can be used to let you make progressive payments to your builder. It includes interest-only repayment options with terms of one or two years.
Customer can have a variable interest rate, a fixed interest rate, or have a mix of fixed and variable rates.
Customer can make additional repayments unlimited on variable rate loans, and up to a total of $20,000 on fixed rate loans.

eligibility.additionalValue: Australian citizen or permanent resident, or New Zealand citizen. Restrictions apply if residential address is an overseas addresss.

fees.name: Rate Lock Fee (for fixed rate home loans)
